description_long: This is a rugged wooden storage box with a square shape, reinforced by diagonal and horizontal wooden planks on each side for added structural integrity. The wood is weathered and stained, showing signs of heavy use and exposure to the elements, with dark smudges and scratches scattered across its surfaces. Metal bolts are visible at the corners, securing the planks together and enhancing durability. The box has no visible handles, locks, or labeling, giving it a utilitarian and industrial appearance. The top is flat and solid, suitable for stacking or supporting other objects. Its robust construction suggests it is designed for storing or transporting heavy or bulky items in urban environments such as warehouses, garages, or construction sites.
description: A weathered, reinforced wooden storage box with metal bolts and a rugged, utilitarian appearance. The surfaces are stained and scratched, and the box is built for durability and heavy use.
description_view_0: This view shows a side of the box with a prominent diagonal wooden plank and visible metal bolts at the corners, along with dark stains and scratches.
description_view_1: This side is similar to view 0 but features slightly different stain patterns and the diagonal plank runs in the opposite direction.
description_view_2: This view closely resembles view 0, with the same diagonal plank orientation and weathered wood texture, but with subtle differences in the wood grain and stain marks.
description_view_3: This side mirrors view 1, with the diagonal plank running in the same direction and similar weathering, but with unique stain and scratch patterns.
